description: Test fixture data for embedding infrastructure tests

chunks.docstring: Calculates embedding vector for given text input

chunks.content:
# Embedding Service

The embedding service provides efficient vector embedding generation using OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small model.

## Features

- LRU caching for performance
- Batch processing for efficiency
- Retry logic with exponential backoff
- Cost tracking and monitoring

## Usage

```typescript
const service = new EmbeddingService(config);
const embedding = await service.embedText('Hello world');
```

chunks.docstring: Processes large batches of text by chunking into smaller batches
Calculates cosine distance between two vectors
Retries a function with exponential backoff
Generates embeddings for large batches with rate limiting

chunks.content:
## Performance Considerations

### Caching Strategy

The LRU cache maintains the 10,000 most recently used embeddings, providing:
- Hit rate > 80% for typical workloads
- Sub-millisecond cache lookups
- Automatic expiration after 1 hour

### Batch Processing

Batch requests to the API for optimal throughput:
- Use batch size of 100 texts per request
- Implement delays between batches to avoid rate limits
- Track costs to stay within budget

### Cost Optimization

With text-embedding-3-small model:
- Cost: $0.02 per 1M tokens
- Average token count: ~50 tokens per code chunk
- Target monthly cost: < $100
